hero.title: Hello, I'm Faqih
hero.name: I'm a Full Stack Developer
hero.description: Blending 9 years of experience as an HR with Full Stack Development expertise. I help businesses digitally transform with innovative application solutions.

services.title: What
services.description: Here are some of the services that I offer to help you achieve your goals.

1.title: Full Stack Development
1.desc: Building modern web applications end-to-end with React, Next.js, Node.js, and more — from pixel-perfect UI to scalable backend infrastructure.

2.title: HR Digital Transformation
2.desc: 9 years of HR experience turned into digital solutions — HRIS, payroll systems, employee portals, and recruitment tools that actually match how HR teams work.

3.title: Business Process Automation
3.desc: Translating complex business workflows into efficient web applications — reducing manual work, minimizing errors, and increasing operational speed.

4.title: Collaboration & Consulting
4.desc: Bridging the gap between business needs and technical solutions — I understand both the human side and the code side, so nothing gets lost in translation.

stack.title: What
stack.description: Here is the core tech stack I use to build robust web applications.

about.title: Who
about.description: This is a brief introduction about myself and my background.
about.content: Bridging HR management and technology. With 9 years of experience as an HR practitioner and expertise in Full-Stack Development, I build digital solutions that truly understand how a business works. From modern web applications to complex internal systems, my focus isn't just on writing lines of code, but on developing effective solutions to solve operational problems for companies through the right technology.
about.add-desc-1: Turning complex ideas into functional digital experiences with deep enthusiasm and empathy.
about.add-desc-2: Continuously mastering modern tech stacks to deliver fast, scalable, and future-proof solutions.
about.add-desc-3: Ensuring every feature operates accurately and directly solves your real business challenges.

experience.title: My Experience
experience.description: My professional journey in HR and web development
experience.description-1: Leading the development of scalable web applications using modern technologies. Mentoring junior developers and architecting solutions for complex business requirements.
experience.description-2: Developed and maintained multiple client projects, focusing on responsive design and performance optimization. Collaborated with design teams to implement pixel-perfect interfaces.
experience.description-3: Built responsive web applications and implemented modern UI/UX designs. Worked in an agile environment with rapid prototyping and iterative development.
experience.description-4: Started my professional journey developing websites and web applications. Learned best practices in coding, version control, and project management.
